NewsGallery.title: News/Gallery
NewsGallery.news1: We're opening a new branch in the center of Tashkent. Come and enjoy our signature dishes in a cozy atmosphere.
NewsGallery.news2: Presenting our updated menu with seasonal dishes. The chef has prepared special new items just for you.
NewsGallery.news3: We host a cooking master class every Saturday. Learn to cook our signature dishes together with us.
